message:
feat(newproj): track current screen for signal handlers

Adds WIZARD_CURRENT_SCREEN and WIZARD_REDRAW_FUNCTION tracking in
run_screen() to support proper resize/interrupt handling during the
TUI wizard flow. This allows signal handlers to know which screen is
active and which render function to call for redraws.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -144,6 +144,15 @@ run_screen() {
         return 1
     fi
 
+    # Track current screen for signal handlers (resize/interrupt)
+    WIZARD_CURRENT_SCREEN="$screen_id"
+    local redraw="render_${screen_id}_screen"
+    if declare -f "$redraw" &>/dev/null; then
+        WIZARD_REDRAW_FUNCTION="$redraw"
+    else
+        WIZARD_REDRAW_FUNCTION=""
+    fi
+
     log_debug "Running screen: $screen_id via $runner"
 
     # Run the screen
